## Checklist

- [ ] The resource is real, actively maintained, and on-topic for this list.
- [ ] The link uses the canonical URL (official site or GitHub repo).
- [ ] The entry follows the format: `- [Name](url) - One concise sentence ending with a period.`
- [ ] It is placed in the most relevant section and is not a duplicate.
- [ ] No broken links, and the description avoids marketing fluff.
